memory:memory/2026-04-27.md:51:57.snippet: - Google Docs API via Maton gateway: `https://gateway.maton.ai/google-docs/v1/...` (NOT `/google-docs/docs/v1/`) - MATON_API_KEY stored in `openclaw.json` at `skills.entries.api-gateway.apiKey` - maton.ai gateway (not matonic.ai for standard API) — `gateway.maton.ai/{app}/{native-path}` - Connection header: `Maton-Connection: {connection_id}` for specifying OAuth connection - Google Docs batchUpdate insertText works with plain text (40KB no problem); no markdown-to-Docs conversion available - xurl CLI available at `/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/bin/xurl` but unauthenticated - web_fetch works well for BBC and Gulf News; limited for AP, Al Jazeera, Iran International (JS rendering / paywalls)
